notes: Consumed by ThemeProvider. Each theme has an identical token schema so the same components render correctly regardless of which theme is active. Themes swap design tokens and motif/animation personality only -- they do not change app structure, routes, or component layout.

globalScrollEngine.inspiration: landonorris.com -- cinematic momentum scroll, sharp transitions, confident reveal choreography

libraries.optionalPinnedSequences: GSAP ScrollTrigger -- Dashboard hero only, see scope note

globalScrollEngine.scopeNote: Full scroll-jacking / pinned-section takeovers are reserved for the Dashboard's hero/intro area only -- a one-time, non-repetitive entrance. Physics/Chemistry/Maths/Tests routes get momentum smoothing and staggered reveal-on-scroll for cards and lecture rows, but must NEVER pin or hijack scroll on routes the user interacts with dozens of times a day (ticking checkboxes, filtering tests). Cinematic effects that add friction to repeat interactions are a usability regression, not a feature.
sharedBehaviors: Smooth inertia scrolling (Lenis) applied globally, all themes
Chapter/lecture cards and test rows stagger-fade-in as they enter viewport (Framer Motion whileInView, ~40-60ms stagger per item, disabled entirely if prefers-reduced-motion is set)
Numeric stats (sync ratio %, hours remaining) animate as a count-up on first reveal only, not on every re-render

Countdown digits (T-minus / days-hours-min-sec) update via their own 1s interval, unaffected by scroll animation -- do not wrap them in scroll-reveal logic since they must always be visible/live regardless of scroll position

themes.name: NERV Terminal
themes.mood: Tense, technical, high-stakes military-readout. Feels like tracking a countdown to impact, not a to-do list.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Ring labeled 'SYNC RATIO', sync-green fill, ticks like a gauge
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Thin diagonal hazard-stripe accent bar (repeating 45deg yellow/void)
motifs.buttonStyle: Sharp corners, uppercase, wide letter-spacing, thin border, no fill until hover
motifs.cardStyle: Flat panel, 1px border-subtle, no shadow, faint scanline texture optional (off by default)
motifs.signatureElement: T-MINUS countdown in large Share Tech Mono digits with a flicker-tick on each second

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Snap-in with minimal easing (feels like a terminal printing a line), occasional single-frame glitch-flicker on major section entrance, no soft parallax drift

themes.name: Urban Wild
themes.inspiration: Urban Wild Studio -- illustrated creative-agency site
themes.mood: Playful, warm, hand-made. Feels encouraging rather than clinical -- makes a grind (revision hours) feel less punishing.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Thick rounded arc/ribbon that visually 'winds' further around as completion rises, echoing the squiggle-ribbon graphic
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Colorful winding ribbon/squiggle line between sections instead of a hard rule
motifs.buttonStyle: Full pill shape, solid fill, no border, soft drop shadow on hover
motifs.cardStyle: Large rounded corners (16-24px), no border, flat color fill or photo, generous padding
motifs.signatureElement: Rounded illustrated icon set for subject sections (hand-drawn feel), italic serif micro-labels above headers ('WHAT YOU'RE STUDYING' etc.)

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Ribbon/squiggle line literally draws itself in (SVG stroke-dashoffset animation) as the section scrolls into view, cards gently rise + fade, soft spring easing, nothing sharp or mechanical

themes.name: Expedition
themes.mood: Moody, exploratory, high-contrast. Treats the syllabus like a body of territory to be mapped and covered, not a checklist.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Plain numeric readout ('38 / 42') with a thin horizontal underline bar, documentary-caption style, not a decorative ring
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Torn-paper-edge transition between major sections (jagged white clip-path over the next section's background)
motifs.buttonStyle: Rectangular, thin 1px border, small yellow square bullet before label, no fill
motifs.cardStyle: Photo/dark card with a subtle dot-grid texture overlay, numbered section labels ('07 Physics.') in the corner
motifs.signatureElement: Small yellow square glyph used as a recurring bullet/marker throughout (mirrors the NatGeo frame icon)

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Torn-paper wipe transition between major sections, otherwise content fades up slowly and heavily (long duration, low-key), grain/noise texture drifts subtly in the background

themes.name: Ultralight
themes.inspiration: Apidura -- outdoor/cycling gear brand, hexagonal navigation
themes.mood: Premium, minimal, expedition-gear precision. Every gram (hour) accounted for.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Slim linear bar, thin outline, minimal fill color -- restraint over decoration
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Thin horizontal hairline, generous whitespace, no ornament
motifs.buttonStyle: Rectangular outline only (no fill), wide letter-spacing uppercase label, hover fills solid
motifs.cardStyle: Hexagonal tile option for the subject-selection view specifically (Physics/Chemistry/Maths as 3 hex tiles, honeycomb layout) -- chapter-level cards inside a subject stay rectangular for practical list scanning
motifs.signatureElement: Hexagon as the subject-picker shape on the Dashboard; everything below that level (chapters, lectures) is standard list/card UI for usability

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Hex tiles assemble into place (scale + fade from 0.9, staggered by honeycomb position) on Dashboard load; elsewhere, simple restrained fade, no bounce or overshoot easing

themes.name: Wanderlust
themes.mood: Warm, inviting, momentum-building. Frames the 11-month arc as a journey with a clear itinerary, not a grind.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Vertical connected-dot timeline (like the Days 1-3 / 4-6 / 7-10 itinerary), each chapter is a stop on the line with a filled dot once complete
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Thin horizontal rule flanked by a section label, generous top/bottom spacing
motifs.buttonStyle: Pill, solid light fill on dark background, dark text
motifs.cardStyle: Bordered rounded-rect info card with a small icon + label (mirrors 'Guides / Flights / Transfers / Hotels' cards) -- good fit for the Settings constants and the Tests filter chips
motifs.signatureElement: Huge oversized condensed headline treatment for section titles (e.g. a giant 'PHYSICS' behind the chapter list, low opacity, mirrors the giant 'JAPAN' hero type)

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Background gradient subtly shifts hue as you scroll between sections (peach to dusk-blue, echoing the page-level gradient), timeline dots fill in with a short delay after their card enters view, photo/hero elements get a slow parallax drift

themes.name: Duotone
themes.inspiration: Folioblox -- bold personal-portfolio site with duotone photography
themes.mood: Confident, bold, high-contrast personal-record energy -- your prep tracked like a portfolio of work, not a chore list.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Bold oversized percentage number as the primary display, small ring as a secondary accent -- numbers-forward like a stat card
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Hard cut from a bold gradient/duotone hero block straight into a flat black panel -- no soft transition
motifs.buttonStyle: Pill, solid accent fill, small circular arrow glyph trailing the label
motifs.cardStyle: Grayscale/duotone-treated imagery blocks framing numbered stats (#01-#04 style) -- good fit for a 'this week' stats strip on the Dashboard
motifs.signatureElement: Numbered feature list style (#01, #02, #03...) reused for ranked/ordered content, e.g. top-priority pending chapters or weakest-scoring test subjects

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Hard color-block wipe/reveal (duotone gradient sweeps in) on major section entrance, then a snappy, confident fade+slide for individual cards -- fast, decisive easing, not floaty

themes.name: Formula 1 Paddock
themes.inspiration: Formula 1 timing wall, pit-lane strategy screens, and carbon-fiber garage panels
themes.mood: Fast, exacting, race-engineered. Turns study progress into lap deltas, stint targets, and podium-chase momentum.

motifs.progressIndicatorStyle: Timing-tower rings with red sector highlights and teal delta accents
motifs.sectionDividerStyle: Chequered micro-stripe with a red DRS activation line
motifs.buttonStyle: Pit-wall command buttons: compact uppercase labels, carbon dark fill, red active border
motifs.cardStyle: Garage telemetry cards with lap/stint numbering and crisp panel borders
motifs.signatureElement: Race-control delta readout comparing planned pace to actual lecture pace

scrollAnimation.revealStyle: Quick lights-out snap with short forward motion, like a race start sequence

themes.name: Verstappen RB1
themes.inspiration: Original Formula 1-inspired racing palette without official logos or driver photographs.
themes.mood: High-contrast motorsport dashboard with readable telemetry panels and reduced-motion-safe interactions.
